name: BB:UBA : GoToMyPC and OpenVPN ports
notes: This BB tracks all the traffic through the ports 8200, 1194,943
bb_references: BB:UBA : GoToMyPC and OpenVPN ports on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the source or destination port is any of 8200, 1194, 943
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : GoToMyPC and OpenVPN ports on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the source or destination port is any of 8200, 1194, 943
